out_of_scope_note: Out of scope: US DOE technical report on solid-state materials engineering for energy storage/conversion (solid-oxide fuel cells, all-solid-state lithium-ion batteries, ceramic-metal composite electrodes/electrolytes). Chemomechanics of far-from-equilibrium interfaces in inorganic functional composites — not relevant to computational neuroscience (perception, decision-making, neural coding, behavioural modelling).
